en: I'd keep an eye on that dowry if I were you. Those days are behind me. Right behind you.
ko: 만약 내가 너라면 그 지참금을 주의 깊게 살펴볼 거야. 그런 시절은 지나갔어.
ja: 私なら持参金に気をつけるよ。あの頃は終わった。
zhTW: 我要是你會看好那筆嫁妝。那些日子已經過去了。
vi: Toi se de y den cua hoi mon neu la ban. Nhung ngay do da qua.

en: This cost us the rent more than once. Well, with all due respect, Mr. Holmes, you know John very well.
ja: 失礼ですが、ホームズさん、ジョンのことはよく知ってますね。
zhTW: 恕我直言，Holmes先生，你很了解John。
vi: Voi su ton trong, ong Holmes, ong biet John rat ro.

en: What about a complete stranger? What can you tell about me?
zhTW: 那對一個完全的陌生人呢？
vi: Con mot nguoi hoan toan xa la thi sao?

en: You, I don't think that's... I don't know that that's... Not at dinner. Perhaps some other time.
ja: ディナー中はやめとこう。
zhTW: 我不知道那是不是......不要在晚餐時。
vi: Toi khong biet do co... Khong phai luc an toi.

en: I insist. You insist? You remember we discussed this. The lady insists.
ko: 다른 때 하자. 난 주장해. 너도 주장해? 우리가 이 얘기를 했던 거 기억나?
zhTW: 你記得我們討論過這個。
vi: Ban nho chung ta da thao luan ve dieu nay.

en: You're a governess. Well done. Yes, well done. Shall we... Waiter!
ja: あなたは家庭教師。よくできました。
vi: Ban la gia su. Lam tot lam.

en: Your student. He's a boy of age.
zhTW: 你的學生。他是個到年紀的男孩。
vi: Hoc tro ban. La con trai o tuoi do.

en: Charlie's seven, actually. Then he's tall for his age.
ko: 오. 그럼 또래에 비해 키가 크네.
ja: じゃあ年の割に背が高い。
zhTW: 那他身高對年紀來說很高。
vi: Vay thi no cao so voi tuoi.

en: He fled Lincolnshire today. Is there ink on my face?
There's nothing wrong with your face. There are two drops on your ear, in fact.
vi: Thuc ra co hai giot tren tai ban.

en: And they're nearly impossible to wash off. Anyway, a very impetuous act by the boy,
ja: とにかく、男の子の衝動的な行動だけど、あなたは経験豊富で軽率に反応しない。
zhTW: 總之，男孩做了一個很衝動的舉動，但你太有經驗不會輕率反應，
vi: Du sao, do la hanh dong bong bot cua cau be, nhung ban qua kinh nghiem de phan ung voi va,

en: but you're too experienced to react rashly, which is why the lady for whom you work lent you their necklace.
ko: 당신이 일하는 그 여자가 왜 그 목걸이를 빌려줬는지 말이죠.
ja: だからあなたの雇い主がネックレスを貸したんだ。
zhTW: 所以你工作的那位女士借了你那條項鏈。
vi: nen nguoi ban lam viec cho da muon ban soi day chuyen.
